name: Ellen's Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, pepper, and salt in a bag. Add meat and shake until coated.
2. Heat oil in a Dutch oven over medium heat.
3. Brown the meat on all sides, making sure to get good color and flavor.
4. Add chopped onions and minced garlic to the pot.
5. Pour in boiling water and canned tomatoes.
6. Stir in salt, Worcestershire sauce, and add basil, dill, and thyme.
7. Cover the pot and reduce heat to low.
8. Simmer for 2 hours until the meat begins to get tender.
9. Add potatoes, quartered onions, and carrots.
10. Cook for an additional 30-45 minutes until vegetables are done.
11. Finally, add peas and continue cooking until heated through.
